pi_items.source: Odoo HR official demo data (hr/data/hr_demo.xml). Confirmed in setup_data.py line 15: 'Employee Tags: Sales, Trainer, Employee, Consultant'. Also used in multiple tasks throughout the environment (promotion_and_department_update, allocate_leave_by_tag).

Task description and setup_task.sh indicate 'Contractor' is a new tag to be created/used as replacement. Not present in official Odoo demo data (which includes Sales, Trainer, Employee, Consultant tags only). Verified in export_result.sh line 38 comment: 'usually Contractor isn't in standard demo data'.

Odoo HR official demo data includes 20 named employees. Both Jeffrey Kelly and Anita Oliver are explicitly listed in setup_data.py lines 7-10: '20 employees: Jeffrey Kelly, Marc Demo, Ronnie Hart, Tina Williamson, Abigail Peterson, Audrey Peterson, Eli Lambert, Rachel Perry, Keith Byrd, Doris Cole, Ernest Reed, Toni Jimenez, Anita Oliver, Sharlene Rhodes, Randall Lewis, Jennie Fletcher, Paul Williams, Walter Horton, Beth Evans (+ Mitchell Admin)'. Both employees referenced throughout environment in multiple tasks.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task operates on Odoo HR official demo data with 20 pre-existing employees. The target employees for tag replacement are Jeffrey Kelly and Anita Oliver (both confirmed in official Odoo demo data). The old tag 'Consultant' is an official demo data employee tag. The new tag 'Contractor' is not in standard demo data and must be created by the agent. The task requires replacing the 'Consultant' tag with 'Contractor' on these two employees and ensuring no employees remain with the 'Consultant' tag.
